TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Takubuwan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 451 buwan, 1,209 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 211 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 998 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Sakizaya 3%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Takubuwan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Takubuwan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Takubuwan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Takubuwan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Takubuwan hya' ga Sakur. tay mkyahu' na Takubuwan hya' ga Kenuy. tay 'zil na Takubuwan hya' ga Kanian. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas pqwsan biru krahu maki 1 pqwsan biru krahu. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ takuβuwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕakur. taj mkjaħuʔ na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa kenuj. taj ʔzil na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa kanian. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu maki * pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Takubuwan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 451 buwan, 1,209 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 211 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 998 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Sakizaya 3%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Takubuwan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Takubuwan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Takubuwan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Takubuwan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Takubuwan hya' ga Sakur. tay mkyahu' na Takubuwan hya' ga Kenuy. tay 'zil na Takubuwan hya' ga Kanian. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas pqwsan biru krahu maki 1 pqwsan biru krahu. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ takuβuwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕakur. taj mkjaħuʔ na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa kenuj. taj ʔzil na takuβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa kanian. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu maki * pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
